_comment: Example tv-overrides.json. Install at /etc/autorip/tv-overrides.json (or override path with TV_OVERRIDES_FILE).  See bin/lib/tv-overrides.sh for the full schema.

shows._comment: Keys are lowercase show names matched after parse_tv_disc_title and after label_rewrites are applied.  Each entry may set 'tmdb_id' (forces an exact TMDb show, skips fuzzy search) and/or 'name' (overrides the canonical name used in the file path).

label_rewrites._comment: Patterns are regex, matched case-insensitively against the FULL raw disc title (e.g. 'SP1_S1D1').  First match wins.  'show' replaces only the show portion.
